transcript: This is British explorer Percy Fawcett. He was last heard from here, deep in the Amazon rainforest, in 1925. He was on his eighth expedition in the Amazon and he had one objective, to find the ruins of a lost city that he called Zee. The idea was based on rumors that had circulated for centuries, that there was once large cities filled with people deep in the Amazon. But Fawcett never found Zee, or any other city.
